popularStory.headline: John Coolidge
popularStory.description:
John Coolidge was bornin 1603 at Cottonham,Cambridge England to parents William Coolidge and Margaret Mayse . He married Mary Ravens the daughter of Rev. Richard Ravens and Elizabeth Hedges.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Coolidge於1604年出生在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆時，他的父親William Coolidge41歲，母親Margaret Mayse37歲。他於大約1628年與Mary Ravens在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年5月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年87歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Coolidge于1604年出生在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆时，他的父亲William Coolidge41岁，母亲Margaret Mayse37岁。他于大约1628年与Mary Ravens在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年5月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年87岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Coolidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably an occupational name for acollege servant or someone with some other association with auniversity college, for example a tenant farmer who farmed one of themany farms in England known as College Farm, most of which are or wereowned by university colleges.

variants.name: Colledge
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): habitational name from Colwich in Staffordshire, named from Old English col ‘(char)coal’ + wīc ‘building’. The name has become associated with the familiar word college.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Coolidge was born in 1604, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, William Coolidge, was 41 and his mother, Margaret Mayse, was 37. He married Mary Ravens about 1628, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 May 1691, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 87, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Coolidge est né en 1604, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, William Coolidge, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mayse, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Ravens environ 1628, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1691, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Coolidge 1604 in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Coolidge 41 und seine Mutter Margaret Mayse 37. Er hat um 1628 in England Mary Ravens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Mai 1691 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Coolidge è nato il nel 1604 nel Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, William Coolidge, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mayse, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Ravens circa 1628, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 maggio 1691, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Coolidgeが1604年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムで生まれた時，父William Coolidgeは41歳，母Margaret Mayseは37歳であった。約1628年にイギリスでMary Ravensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年5月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Coolidge(이)가 1604년 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Coolidge(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mayse(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1628년 영국에서 Mary Ravens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 5월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Coolidge nasceu em 1604, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Coolidge, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mayse, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ravens aproximadamente 1628, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1691, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Coolidge родился в 1604 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Coolidge было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mayse, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ravens около 1628 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 мая 1691 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Coolidge nació en 1604, en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Coolidge, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret Mayse, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Mary Ravens aproximadamente 1628, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1691, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
